title: Savory Crisp Croatian Chorizo Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy meal-prep dish featuring crispy chorizo, bhuna-style vegetables, and a vegetarian-friendly twist for a satisfying mid-day snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Bell Peppers
ingredients.notes: Red and yellow for color contrast.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil (for searing)
ingredients.notes: For adding crispiness to chorizo and onions.

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a pan, add sliced chorizo, onion, and garlic. Cook until the chorizo is crispy and onions are translucent.
Add bell peppers, stir-fry for about 5 minutes, until slightly softened but still crunchy on the outside.
Drizzle water over the vegetables to soften them further if desired. Season with salt and bhuna spice mix (adjustable).
Serve hot as a quick snack or meal prepped side dish.
